task_completion.description: Log in to the Ekylibre application using the provided credentials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Browser showing the Ekylibre dashboard or interface at http://demo.ekylibre.farm:3000, indicating a successful login (e.g., user profile or logout button visible).

task_completion.description: Identify 'Blé tendre d'hiver' (soft winter wheat) parcels for the current (2023) campaign.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screen showing a list, map, or table of farm parcels filtered by or displaying 'Blé tendre d'hiver' for the 2023 campaign.

task_completion.description: Initiate a phytosanitary spray intervention and set the date to 2023-06-15.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An intervention creation or edit form showing the procedure type as spraying/treatment (pulvérisation/traitement) and the date explicitly set to '2023-06-15'.

task_completion.description: Specify the treatment product, application equipment, and farm worker for the intervention.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The intervention form has filled-in fields for the treatment product (produit), application equipment (matériel/équipement), and farm worker (intervenant/employé).

task_completion.description: Record separate interventions for multiple wheat parcels (minimum 3 required).
task_completion.visual_evidence: A list or summary view of interventions showing at least 3 distinct spraying records dated 2023-06-15 for different 'Blé tendre d'hiver' parcels.

integrity.description: The agent used the Ekylibre web interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the Ekylibre UI, not a terminal executing API requests (like curl) or automated scripts.

integrity.description: The agent did not use direct database commands to insert the records.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing PostgreSQL (psql) or Ruby on Rails console commands are visible.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely interacted with the form elements.
integrity.visual_evidence: Intermediate screenshots show dropdown menus open, text being typed into fields, or individual form pages being navigated, rather than just a final success screen appearing out of nowhere.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating at least 3 separate spraying interventions in the Ekylibre web app (http://demo.ekylibre.farm:3000). Target crop: 'Blé tendre d'hiver' (Soft winter wheat). Target campaign: 2023. Target date: 2023-06-15. Procedure type should be related to spraying/pulvérisation/treatment. Each record must include a product, equipment, and worker. Look for a final list of interventions showing at least 3 entries matching these criteria to award full points for the final step.
